name: Aneurysm Coils — Framing & Filling
pi: Fabian Holzberger, Markus Muhr, Barbara Wohlmuth
institution: Department of Mathematics, Technical University of Munich
description: Endovascular coil meshes from Holzberger et al. (2024), simulated via the discrete elastic rod (DER) model at ~32% packing density. Framing coil: 3D shape, D1=76µm, D2=355µm, D3=5mm, L=150mm. Filling coil: helical, D1=50µm, D2=254µm, D3=2mm, L=200mm.
